name: Basil-Tarragon Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the olive oil in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Whisk briefly to combine.
3. Add the extra virgin olive oil and whisk until incorporated.
This dressing is excellent for pasta salads and as a marinade for tomatoes and other fresh vegetables. The mild flavor of the fresh herbs enhances the natural flavors of the ingredients without overpowering the more delicate components. Best made up fresh daily. The delicate oils of the herbs deteriorate when stored for any length of time.
Note: Best when fresh herbs are used!!
Makes 1 1/4 cups.
